clusters.cluster_method: Quartile-based classification from RNA-seq RPKM across 10 growth conditions
clusters.treatment: Steady-state expression level classification across multiple growth conditions

clusters.cluster_functional_description: Enriched for menaquinone and ubiquinone genes (6/9 genes, p=0.00045).
clusters.cluster_temporal_pattern: Non-expressed gene cluster per Table 1 classification.
clusters.treatment: Simulated diel light-dark cycle (14h light : 10h dark) over 48 hours

clusters.cluster_functional_description: Contains nitrogen transport genes such as urtA and cynA. Enriched for transport and binding category.
clusters.cluster_temporal_pattern: Most rapidly and highly upregulated genes in MED4 during nitrogen starvation, with expression first appearing within 6 hours and peaking early in the time course.

derived_metrics.name: MED4 vesicle DNA average read coverage (Biller 2014 Table S4, top-50 ORFs)
derived_metrics.field_description: Average read coverage across the entire ORF, from Illumina MiSeq sequencing of vesicle-encapsulated, DNase-protected, MDA-amplified DNA from MED4 cultures. Combined dataset across two biological replicate libraries. Top 50 ORFs by coverage; 1079 of 1949 MED4 ORFs had >=1 read.

clusters.treatment: Steady-state expression level classification across multiple growth conditions

__role: driver B — F1 floor (singleton ortholog group)

identity.function_description: Required for full expression of proteins subject to ammonium repression. Transcriptional activator of genes subject to nitrogen control

clusters.cluster_method: Quartile-based classification from RNA-seq RPKM across 10 growth conditions
clusters.treatment: Steady-state expression level classification across multiple growth conditions

clusters.cluster_functional_description: Enriched for menaquinone and ubiquinone genes (6/9 genes, p=0.00045).
clusters.cluster_temporal_pattern: Non-expressed gene cluster per Table 1 classification.
clusters.treatment: Simulated diel light-dark cycle (14h light : 10h dark) over 48 hours

clusters.cluster_functional_description: Contains the rapidly-responding subset of hli genes (including hli10) and ntcA. The most highly upregulated hli genes have the strongest NtcA binding sites.
clusters.cluster_temporal_pattern: Rapidly and highly upregulated early in nitrogen starvation, representing the fast-responding hli subset distinct from the later-responding hli genes in cluster 3.
